sentence: مَرْحَبَا، شُو أَخْبَارَك؟ كِيفَك وكِيف الصِّحَّة؟
raw: مرحبا، شو أخبارك؟ كيفك وكيف الصحة؟
ipa: ˈmarħabeː ˈʃuː ʔaxˈbaːrak ˈkiːfak ˈwkiːf ɑsˤˈsˤiħħa
gloss_en: Hello, what's your news? How are you and how is your health?
notes: šū interrogative (cowell1964 p.566); Beiruti kīfak (almbark2015); geminate حّ in ṣiḥḥa

sentence: اَلْبَحْر هَادِي الْيَوم وَالشَّمْس طَالْعَة عَ الْمِينَا.
raw: البحر هادي اليوم والشمس طالعة ع المينا.
ipa: ilˈbaħr ˈhaːdiː lˈjoːm waʃˈʃams ˈtˤɑːlʕa ˈʕa ilˈmiːneː
gloss_en: The sea is calm today and the sun is rising over the harbour.
notes: monophthong ō in اليوم /aljoːm/ (almbark2015: Levantine aw→ō); emphatic ط; ʕa- 'on' contraction (cowell1964)

sentence: مَا بَدِّي رُوح عَ الشُّغُل بُكْرَا، عِنْدِي مَوْعِد عَنْد الْحَكِيم.
raw: ما بدي روح ع الشغل بكرا، عندي موعد عند الحكيم.
ipa: ˈmaː ˈbaddiː ˈruːħ ˈʕa ˈaʃʃuɣul ˈbukraː ˈʕindiː ˈmoːʕid ˈʕand alħaˈkiːm
gloss_en: I don't want to go to work tomorrow, I have an appointment at the doctor's.
notes: baddi negation mā baddi (cowell1964 p.415); ʕa-š-šuɣl with article assimilation after ʕa-

sentence: قَدَّيْش حَقّ كِيلُو التُّفَّاح بِسُوق الضَّيْعَة؟
raw: قديش حق كيلو التفاح بسوق الضيعة؟
ipa: ʔadˈdeːʃ ˈħaʔʔ ˈkiːluː ttufˈfaːħ biˈsuːʔ ɑdˤˈdˤeːʕa
gloss_en: How much is a kilo of apples in the village market?
notes: ʔaddēš (cowell1964 p.567); ق=/ʔ/ (almbark2015; fadda2016); geminates قّ فّ; ض=/dˤ/ stop

sentence: عَمِّي جَاب زَيْتُون وجِبْنِة بَلَدِيِّة مِن الضَّيْعَة.
raw: عمي جاب زيتون وجبنة بلدية من الضيعة.
ipa: ˈʕammiː ˈʒeːb zeːˈtuːn ˈwʒibne balaˈdijje min ɑdˤˈdˤeːʕa
gloss_en: My uncle brought olives and local cheese from the village.
notes: ج=/ʒ/ (cowell1964 ch.1); Beiruti imala aː→eː in ʒeːb (almbark2015: Beirut fronted ā); imala -e in جِبْنِة

gloss_en: Take this garment and try it on now.
notes: Beiruti hayda and hallaq (cowell1964); ā→ē fronting surfaces (heːdeː); ث → t stop reflex in tob

sentence: الطَّقْس مِش مْنِيح الْيَوم وْعَم تْشَتِّي.
raw: الطقس مش منيح اليوم وعم تشتي.
ipa: ɑtˤˈtˤɑʔs ˈmiʃ ˈmniːħ alˈjoːm ˈwʕam ˈtʃattiː
gloss_en: The weather isn't nice today and it's raining.
notes: miš negation (cowell1964); mnīḥ 'good' (cowell1964); aw→oː il-yōm (almbark2015); ʕam progressive + tšatti 'rain' (cowell1964)

gloss_en: How much is this wallet? Thirty thousand.
notes: bkam price question (cowell1964); ā→eː imala jazdēn, tlētīn (almbark2015; fadda2016); ā blocked before guttural h in hāl demonstrative (LB_IMALA_BLOCK_GUTT)

gloss_en: Our appointment is at three in the afternoon.
notes: aw→oː mawʕid, final -a→e imala sāʕe (almbark2015); tlāte 'three' (cowell1964); emphatic ḍ backing baʕd id-duhr (watson2002)

gloss_en: We have lived in Beirut for a long time.
notes: niḥna, sāknīn (cowell1964); ay→eː monophthong Bērūt (almbark2015; fadda2016); min zamān→zamēn imala (almbark2015)

gloss_en: Turn right and keep going straight.
notes: liff/kammil imperatives, duɣri 'straight' (cowell1964); ʕa l-yamīn (cowell1964)

gloss_en: The food was very good yesterday.
notes: kān→kēn, mbāreḥ→mbēriḥ imala (almbark2015; fadda2016); ṭayyib emphatic + geminate glide ktīr 'very' (cowell1964)

gloss_en: Where are you headed? I don't know yet.
notes: lwēn 'where to', ay→eː monophthong (almbark2015; fadda2016); mā baʕrif negation, lissa 'yet' (cowell1964)

gloss_en: How many children do you have at school?
notes: kam + singular walad (cowell1964); ʕindak possessive (cowell1964); final -a→e imala madrase (fadda2016)

gloss_en: If you come tomorrow, we'll talk.
notes: iza conditional, spelled إزا for the [z] reflex (cowell1964); btiji ج→ʒ; mn- 1pl mniḥki (cowell1964); bukra→bukreː imala (almbark2015)

sentence: رِحِت عَ السُّوق وِشْتَرَيْت خُضْرَة وْفَاكِهَة.
raw: رحت ع السوق وشتريت خضرة وفاكهة.
ipa: ˈriħit ˈʕa sˈsuːʔ wiʃtaˈreːt ˈxudˤre ˈwfeːkiha
gloss_en: I went to the market and bought vegetables and fruit.
notes: riḥit 1sg past, ishtarēt ay→eː (almbark2015); ʕa s-sūʔ ق→ʔ + article assimilation (cowell1964; fadda2016); fākiha→fēkihe imala

sentence: رَح سَافِر عَ فَرَنْسَا الشَّهْر الْجَاي.
raw: رح سافر ع فرنسا الشهر الجاي.
ipa: ˈraħ ˈseːfir ˈʕa faˈransa ʃˈʃahr ilˈʒaːj
gloss_en: I'll travel to France next month.
notes: raḥ future particle, sāfir→sēfir imala (almbark2015); iš-šahr ij-jāy 'next month' (cowell1964)

gloss_en: Call me when you arrive.
notes: daʔʔīli 'give me a call' ق→ʔ + geminate (fadda2016); lamma tūṣal, emphatic ṣ backing (watson2002)

gloss_en: Good morning! Good morning (reply).
notes: ṣabāḥ el-xēr / ṣabāḥ en-nūr greeting pair; ā blocked before ħ (LB_IMALA_BLOCK_GUTT); ay→eː xēr (almbark2015)

gloss_en: The white piastre is useful on the black day (save for a rainy day).
notes: proverb (cowell1964); ق→ʔ il-ʔirš; aw→oː la-l-yōm (almbark2015); emphatic ḍ abyaḍ backing (watson2002)
